name: Reading
description: A good book is the best company, always there for a quiet, alone moment of enriching the mind.

name: Movies
description: After a day of activities having a pause and enjoy watching mystery, action, comedy or romance is entertaining.

name: Games
description: Retro games are never going to loose their spark, that is why playing The Legend of Zelda, Pokemon Red Blue or Yellow forward, Standrew Valley or Animal Crossing make a day better.

name: Hanging out with friends
description: Staying close to those who add and make part of one's life richer is a good habit, so hanging out every now and then outside or indoors is a must.
